title: Songs Of War Custom Weapons
description: This pack add the custom weapons of Songs of war!
body:
![Header showing guard villagers holding different custom swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d81abaee24698120b49a633c09031e72b1ea228_0.webp)

This pack add the custom weapons of Song of war! Rename a weapon a cutsom texture. 

Supported weapons:
- Sword
- Bow
- Axe
- Mace
- Spear
- Hoe

Find the list of names in the gallery tab

From 1.21.5 this is 100% vanilla.
Before that you will need to use either CITResewn, Chime or Polytone. This pack doesn't work with optifine

Diamond and Mace textures are emissive up until 1.21.5

Texture comes from the song of war asset pack, and I did the variation to cover all tier of swords! You are free to use black plasma textures, but please make my pack as a dependencie for the one I modified :)

Modpack?  YES!
Also on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/song-of-war-custom-weapons) now


![Anvil renaming and weapon possibities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d28a78799f7d827db7f76aab3ea1e95f4f0b0e03.png)

[Song of war asset pack](https://onedrive.live.com/?authkey=%21AI1aJDEY%2DxjkN2Q&id=3A043A1D51872709%211175&cid=3A043A1D51872709&sb=size&sd=2)
